metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\fs24Links: {\field{\*\fldinst{HYPERLINK "https://bobobo.de/reaper/J--sat SFX/"}} {\fldrslt website}} / \line\line {\fs48\b OwnSynth\b}\line\line This is a simple synth using\line sine saw square and triangle waves (created from sine waves)\line with hipass and lowpass filters with resonance,\line a sub (oct down) and aub (oct up)\line diable pitchrange settings\line and a clipper.\line and mono to 16 voices\line it is not realy polyphone, you got one osc per note in time\line\line THIS STUFF IS MONO\line\line Mainly made to get a simple synth done n JSFX}
